clusters.justification: These terms share robust co-activation within cortico-amygdalar and insular pathways, representing the overarching functional axis of generating, processing, and evaluating emotionally valenced states.

Relying heavily on frontostriatal and dopaminergic circuitry, this grouping reflects the macroscopic functional domain of computing incentive salience, cost-benefit tradeoffs, and goal-directed drives.

Supported primarily by the macroscopic topology of the default mode network, this cluster reflects internally directed simulations and the integration of self-referential narratives with interpersonal understanding.
